overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a rain-soaked pier in a neon-lit cyberpunk city, then descending into dark water and swimming along the waterfront. The scene features towering futuristic skyscrapers with bright holographic advertisements, an elevated highway structure, and scattered pedestrians before transitioning to a water-level view of the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront promenade beneath elevated highway

events.description: pedestrian density decreases as moving forward along the pier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pier, passing pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the pier edge using a laptop or electronic device
pedestrian in green jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
massive concrete overpass with red neon trim running along the right side of the pier
rain-soaked wooden walkway with greenish reflective surface
bright corporate signage with Asian characters on the building facades
gray concrete barrier separating the pier from the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked wooden pier in a dense cyberpunk city, with towering neon-lit skyscrapers rising in the background. The elevated highway structure looms on the right while pedestrians walk along the wet reflective surface. A person sits on the left using a laptop near the concrete seawall.

events.description: last pedestrians exit the frame, leaving the pier nearly empty
approaching the end of the pier where the walkway meets the water edge

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the pier as the crowd thins out, approaching the water's edge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the camera before passing by

entered.detail: large blue industrial waste bin near the highway support pillars
yellow metal guardrail along the left edge of the pier

segments.scene_description: The pier becomes less crowded as the camera moves toward the water's edge. The elevated highway structure draws closer on the right, and blue trash containers appear near the concrete supports. The neon city towers remain visible ahead while the remaining pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

events.description: camera descends from the pier into the dark water, transitioning to water-level view
camera fully enters water and begins moving forward through the water surface

agents.ego_description: stepping off the pier edge and descending into the water, then moving forward at water level

entered.detail: dark reflective water with ripples and floating debris, reflecting the neon city lights
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
white-topped metal posts sticking up from the water near the pier edge

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the pier into the dark water, transitioning to a low-angle view at the water's surface. The perspective shifts to show the concrete support pillars of the highway structure and the rippling water reflecting the neon lights. The city towers now appear closer and more imposing from this low vantage point.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal waterway with view of cyberpunk city skyline

events.description: passing by a seated person on the pier edge to the left

agents.ego_description: moving through the water along the waterfront, observing the city skyline from water level

notable_agents.action: shirtless person sitting on the pier edge with fishing equipment or personal items

entered.detail: metal bridge or walkway spanning the canal in the distance
concrete platform at the water's edge where a person is seated

segments.scene_description: Moving through the dark canal water with a low-angle view of the towering cyberpunk skyline. The camera passes a shirtless person sitting on the pier edge to the left, with fishing gear nearby. The distant bridge structure becomes visible ahead as the camera continues along the waterfront, with the massive neon-lit buildings dominating the view above the concrete seawall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling, rain-soaked pier down into the dark waters of a neon-lit cyberpunk canal. It begins by walking along a wet wooden pier past pedestrians and a person on a laptop, with towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway looming overhead. As the camera moves toward the water's edge, the crowd thins and the perspective draws closer to the concrete supports and blue trash containers of the highway structure. The scene then shifts as the camera descends from the pier into the rippling dark water, transitioning to a low-angle view where the neon reflections dance on the surface beneath the imposing city towers. Finally, the camera glides through the canal past a fisherman on the pier's edge, moving toward a distant bridge while the massive, glowing skyline dominates the view above the concrete seawall.
